# UC-15.5.10 · CCTV Infrared Night Mode Activation Versus Local Sunset Window

> **Criticality:** Low &middot; **Difficulty:** Beginner &middot; **Pillar:** Observability &middot; **Type:** Analytics, Operational &middot; **Status:** Verified

*We watch the physical data center for power, cooling, environment, and physical access.*

---

## Description

IR stuck on suggests faulty photocells; never switching hints blocked filters hurting low-light quality.

## Value

Reduces noisy night video tickets and IR LED wear.

## Implementation

(1) Ingest day/night mode changes. (2) Compare to astronomical twilight table.

## SPL

```spl
index=physical sourcetype="cctv:analytics" earliest=-7d
| where match(lower(mode), "(?i)ir|night|mono")
| eval hour=strftime(_time,"%H")
| stats count by camera_id hour
```

## Visualization

Heatmap hour × camera.

## Known False Positives

Sensor anomalies during cleaning, calibration, or planned environmental changes.

## References

- [ONVIF specifications](https://www.onvif.org/)
- [Hikvision OpenAPI / ISAPI](https://www.hikvision.com/en/support/download/sdk/)
